# PHIL.028 ? Yoga Philosophy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** yoga_philosophy
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Eight-fold path; union of individual with divine; control of mind modifications; practice and detachment; concentration and meditation

## Application
Cultivate mental discipline; practice systematically; combine effort with detachment; progress through stages; aim for union/integration

## Key Values
- Discipline
- Union
- Mental control
- Systematic practice
